description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a chubby, round cat with a soft, velvety exterior. The upper half of the toy is covered in orange-brown fur with darker stripes on the head, while the lower half is white, mimicking the coloration of a domestic tabby cat. The face features embroidered details including small, round black eyes, a pink nose, and a gentle, slightly downturned mouth, with blushing cheeks and thin black whiskers. Small, rounded ears protrude from the top of the head, and four stubby legs extend from the underside, giving it a squat, endearing appearance. The toy appears to be filled with a lightweight, compressible stuffing, making it soft and squeezable. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the exterior.
description: A round, orange-and-white plush cat with embroidered facial features, small ears, and stubby legs, made of soft fabric and stuffing. Its chubby, endearing form and gentle expression make it visually appealing and huggable.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cat's face with embroidered eyes, nose, mouth, whiskers, and blushing cheeks, as well as both front legs and ears.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rounded body, one ear, and the transition from orange-brown to white fur, with the face partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, both ears, and the stubby hind legs, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view shows the side of the head, one ear, and the curve of the body, with a hint of the face and front leg visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and neutral, with small, round eyes, a tiny pink nose, and a slight, downturned mouth. Blushing cheeks and thin whiskers add to the soft, endearing look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a resting, crouched posture with its body low to the ground and all four stubby legs extended outward. The head is slightly raised, giving it a relaxed and approachable appearance.
